subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One, from the earliest days until this hour, hath been afflicted with trials and tribulations at the hands of His enemies, reaching such extremity of adversity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم از اول ایام الی حین بین ایادی اعدآء مبتلی باساء و ضراء بمقامی رسیده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for opponents; enemies of the Faith, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
